title: Lu Songyi
content:
Lu Songyi was a Soul Formation old man from the 
Da Lou Sword Sect

History
[
]

Lu Songyi, 
Shi Fang
, and a short elder of the Da Lou Sword Sect were looking for Brillian Golden Fruits. When they met 
Wang Lin
, they decided to attack and injure Wang Lin but failed. Lu Songyi was interrogated by Wang Lin before he was killed.

[
]
